---
title: "Appendix: AI Usage Declaration"
author: "Smit Tambat"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
  pdf: default
---

# AI Usage Declaration

In accordance with [Monash University]{.underline}'s policy on the responsible use of AI, I declare that I used Generative AI (ChatGPT by OpenAI) to assist with the following aspects of this assignment:

-    **Quarto document setup and formatting:** I asked for guidance on structuring the Quarto report, including generating both HTML and PDF outputs, using inline R code, and adding captions and cross-references for tables and figures.

-    **R coding support and data analysis workflow:** I used AI assistance to understand beginner-friendly R code for loading, inspecting, and cleaning the dataset, as well as creating summary tables and visualisations using tidyverse and ggplot2.

-    **Data visualisation improvements:** I asked for help customising charts, including scatter plots with trend lines, faceting by customer segment, handling overlapping points with transparency, and selecting professional colour palettes in ggplot.

-    **Academic writing and proofreading:** I used AI to review and improve the grammar, clarity, and phrasing of report paragraphs, including the introduction, data cleaning description, findings, conclusion, and interpretation of results.

The chat link of the relevant AI interactions is attached below-

[Prompt](https://chatgpt.com/share/69df862f-790c-8321-bd50-0dd5deb7c650)
